markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Define a new operating cadence and focus priorities for the next two months.](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Cadence:** Adopt a "work lanes" model to replace the current unstructured process. This provides focus and context, preventing "busy but not effective" work.](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [**Top Priorities:** Focus on two launch-blocking initiatives: 1) building a scalable CMS for organic growth, and 2) creating a complete sign-up and payment flow.](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
  - [**Role Shift:** Stevie will shift from coding small fixes to high-leverage product management: organizing work, shaping features, and improving the Shared Library.](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
  - [**Immediate Action:** Marcel and Stevie will draft a team-wide update by EOD Thursday to introduce the new structure and align everyone on priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=2304.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Unstructured Work & Misaligned Priorities

  - [The current Linear "milestones" are too broad to provide clear direction, leading to a feeling that "if everything's a priority, what's the priority?"](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=2326.0)
  - [This unstructured process risks "busy but not effective" work, where tickets are closed without advancing key milestones.](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=2133.0)
  - [The lack of written updates (a practice from Jose) has reduced team-wide context and alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=2065.0)

### Solution: A "Work Lanes" Operating Cadence

  - [The team will adopt a "work lanes" model to provide focus and context for all work.](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [Each lane is a distinct workstream with clear validation goals.](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Proposed Lanes:**](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [Organic Growth (Goal: Clicks)](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [Customer Validation (Goal: Daily use)](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
      - [Data & Shared Library (Goal: Quality & expansion)](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
      - [Experience & Infrastructure](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)

### Top Priorities: Unblocking Launch

  - [Two initiatives are critical for launch and require immediate focus:](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
  - [**1. Organic Growth CMS**](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
      - [**Why:** To build a defensible lead in organic traffic before better-funded competitors can copy the strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
      - [**Need:** A CMS to enable editors to scale content creation (e.g., brand pages) by managing SEO elements (H1s, meta titles) and connecting workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
      - [**Goal:** Marcel to shape the MVP by EOD Friday for engineering prioritization next week.](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
  - [**2. Sign-up & Payment Flow**](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
      - [**Why:** To build the core monetization loop, which currently does not exist.](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
      - [**Need:** A complete end-to-end experience from sign-up → payment → onboarding.](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
      - [**Goal:** Marcel to focus on pricing/packaging; Stevie to research payment providers (e.g., Plurk vs. Stripe) to enable a quick, informed decision.](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)

### Stevie's Role: High-Leverage PM

  - [Stevie will shift from coding small fixes to high-leverage product management.](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
  - [**Focus Areas:**](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
      - [**Organizing Work:** Structuring the new "work lanes" and driving team-wide asynchronous updates.](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=2065.0)
      - [**Feature Shaping:** Defining MVP requirements for key initiatives like the sign-up flow.](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
      - [**Shared Library Improvement:**](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=1565.0)
          - [**Why:** The library is critical for data quality and needs to reflect reality (e.g., Notion is a note-taker).](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=1823.0)
          - [**Actions:** Correcting subcategory assignments and adding high-quality prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=1751.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Marcel:**](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
      - [Shape MVP requirements for the Organic Growth CMS by EOD Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
      - [Focus on pricing, packaging, and sign-up flow design.](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
  - [**Stevie:**](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=1945.0)
      - [Research payment providers (e.g., Plurk vs. Stripe) and document pros/cons.](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)
      - [Improve Shared Library data quality by correcting subcategories and prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=1565.0)
      - [Organize work into the new "work lanes" structure.](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [**Marcel & Stevie:**](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=2304.0)
      - [Draft a team-wide update by EOD Thursday to introduce the new cadence and priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/f3VjjpbYfysq8ssYxMyJw_bYk7e1xJjt?tab=summary&timestamp=2304.0)
